Enum TimeSpanMaskPart

Lists the parts/segments of time span mask.

Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI.Editors
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public enum TimeSpanMaskPart
Remarks

The DefaultPart uses the TimeSpanMaskPart values.

Fields

Name Description
Days

Specifies the days segment.
Fractional

Specifies the fractional segment.
Hours

Specifies the hour segment.
Milliseconds

Specifies the millisecond segment.
Minutes

Specifies the minute segment.
Seconds

Specifies the seconds segment.
